overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, foggy forest at night. The character passes a wooden watchtower and campfire before approaching and entering a cave entrance with glowing blue interior light.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest clearing with abandoned watchtower

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the foggy forest with two swords strapped to his back, passing a burning campfire on the right side

entered.detail: tall wooden lookout tower with multiple platforms visible through the fog
burning campfire casting orange light on the grass
dense forest of bare deciduous trees shrouded in fog
uneven grassy ground with patches of tall grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a foggy forest clearing at night, with a wooden watchtower visible through the mist to the right. A burning campfire provides the only warm light in the cool blue-toned environment as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest path approaching rocky cave system

events.description: cave entrance becomes visible in the distance through the trees, indicating approach to rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, navigating through denser vegetation and uneven terrain toward the cave

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation emerging from the forest floor
dark cave mouth visible between the trees with faint blue light emanating from within

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes denser as Geralt moves deeper into the woods, with rocky outcrops appearing among the trees. The wooden watchtower and campfire disappear from view as a cave entrance becomes visible in the distance, glowing with mysterious blue light.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave entrance tunnel with bioluminescent blue glow

events.description: transitioning from outdoor forest into the enclosed cave entrance
ambient light shifts to blue glow emanating from deep within the cave interior

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the dark cave entrance, moving from the foggy forest into the rocky tunnel

entered.detail: mysterious blue bioluminescent light glowing from deep inside the cave tunnel
rough stone cave walls with moss and root systems

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and enters the cave entrance, leaving the forest behind. The environment shifts dramatically to an enclosed rocky tunnel with rough stone walls, illuminated by an otherworldly blue glow emanating from deep within the cave system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty nocturnal forest that gradually transitions into a glowing subterranean cavern. It begins in a foggy clearing where a burning campfire casts a warm glow against the cool blue night, with a wooden watchtower visible through the haze. As the character moves forward, the forest densens and rocky outcrops emerge, causing the campfire and tower to fade from view while a distant blue light appears. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and enters a cave mouth, leaving the woods behind. Finally, the environment opens into an enclosed rocky tunnel with rough stone walls, fully illuminated by an otherworldly blue glow emanating from deep within the earth.
